summary: Production ML engineer building creative, multi-modal AI systems. 2+ years shipping models that serve 12,000+ users. Specializing in audio AI, computer vision, generative models — with the wiring to deploy them.

valueProps.title: Multi-Modal AI
valueProps.description: Video · audio · text pipelines on Gemini, OpenAI, Claude.

valueProps.title: Creative Applications
valueProps.description: Real-time audio ML, wearable interfaces, generative systems.

projects.title: CHULOOPA
projects.subtitle: Transformer-based drum generation
projects.description: Low-latency transformer for real-time rhythmic generation in live performance. Researching efficient inference pipelines for generative audio.

projects.title: Multi-Modal Video Analysis
projects.subtitle: Concurrent Gemini pipeline · production
projects.description: Real-time video analysis pipeline with concurrent processing for low-latency response. Deployed in production for thousands of users.

projects.title: Geospatial ML Pipeline
projects.subtitle: Custom CNN · >90% accuracy
projects.description: Custom CNN architecture with data preprocessing and evaluation framework. Achieved >90% accuracy through model optimization.

projects.title: HAI · Head as Interface
projects.subtitle: Wearable gestural instrument
projects.description: Wearable gestural interface for musical performance using IMU sensors. Real-time Max/MSP audio processing controlled by head movements via Arduino.

projects.title: ASCII Drone Synth
projects.subtitle: Gesture-controlled web synth
projects.description: Gesture-controlled drone synthesizer. MediaPipe hand tracking drives web audio synthesis with Tone.js.

projects.title: Parallel Paths
projects.subtitle: Responsible AI in music
projects.description: Exploration of responsible AI integration in songwriting practice using Gemini and Suno APIs. Research on ethical creative AI workflows.

bullets: Built real-time multi-modal video analysis using Google Gemini with concurrent pipelines optimized for low latency.
Architected GenAI solutions integrating Gemini · OpenAI · Claude into production systems serving 12,000+ users.
Designed AI recommendation engine with evaluation framework and data pipelines for high-volume workflows.
Cross-functional collaboration on system requirements, design reviews, and documentation.
Developed production LLM assistant with ReAct agents and RAG; retrieval pipelines, embeddings, prompt engineering.
Built geospatial ML pipelines in PyTorch; >90% accuracy via model optimization and data preprocessing.
Designed evaluation frameworks and debugging workflows to validate ML feasibility for production.
Established best practices through code reviews and docs while team scaled from 4 → 13 engineers.
Developing real-time generative audio systems with PyTorch; researching low-latency ML inference and custom audio generation models.
Built computer vision pipelines using Python, OpenCV, scikit-learn. Coursework in algorithms, data structures, and ML.
